title: Lubricant composition comprising an antioxidant composition
abstract: A lubricant composition is disclosed comprising an antioxidant composition and a lubricating oil. The antioxidant composition comprises a phenolic antioxidant having the structure (I), and a phosphite antioxidant having the structure (II) wherein A is a direct bond or an alkylene; X is âC(O)Oâ, âOC(O)â, âC(O)N(R 7 )â,âN(R 7 )C(O)â, âC(O)â, âN(R 7 )â, âOâ, or âSâ; R 1 and R 2 are each independently a C 1 -C 10 alkyl, a C 2 -C 10 alkenyl, a C 2 -C 10 alkynyl, or a C 3 -C 12 aryl; R 3 includes a C 1 -C 80 alkyl, a C 2 -C 80 alkenyl, a C 2 -C 80 alkynyl, or a C 3 -C 12 aryl; R 4 , R 5 , and R 6 are each independently hydrogen, alkyl, alkenyl, alkynyl, or aryl provided that at least one of R 4 , R 5 , and R 6 is not hydrogen; R 7 is H or an alkyl; and m, n, and o are each independently from 1 to 3.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A lubricant composition comprising: an antioxidant composition comprising a phenolic antioxidant having the following structure (I) (I), and a phosphite antioxidant having the following structure (II) wherein, A is a direct bond or an alkylene; X is -C(0)0-, -OC(O)-, -C(0)N(R 7 )-, -N(R 7 )C(0)-, - C(O)-, -N(R 7 )-, -0-, or-S-; Ri and R2 are each independently a C1-C10 alkyl, a C2- C10 alkenyl, a C2-C10 alkynyl, or a C3-C12 aryl; R3 includes a Ci-Cso alkyl, a C2-C80 alkenyl, a C2-C80 alkynyl, or a C3-C12 aryl; R4, R5, and R6 are each independently hydrogen, alkyl, alkenyl, alkynyl, or aryl provided that at least one of R4, Rs, and R6 is not hydrogen; R 7 is H or an alkyl; and m, n, and 0 are each independently from 1 to 3; and 

 a lubricating oil. 2. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the weight ratio of the phenolic antioxidant to the phosphite antioxidant is from 0.1 to 10. 3. The lubricant composition of claim 2, wherein the weight ratio of the phenolic antioxidant to the phosphite antioxidant is from 0.33 to 3. 4. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the phenolic antioxidant is present in the lubricant composition in an amount of from 0.01% by weight to 5% by weight. 5. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the phosphite antioxidant is present in the lubricant composition in an amount of from 0.01% by weight to 5% by weight. 6. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the lubricant composition exhibits a standard RPVOT oxidation induction time of 150 minutes or more as determined according to ASTM D2272-14a and at a temperature of 150Â°C. 7. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the lubricant composition exhibits a standard RPVOT oxidation induction time as determined according to ASTM D2272-14a at a temperature of 150Â°C of at least 20% greater than an expected standard RPVOT oxidation induction time. 8. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the lubricant composition exhibits a dry RPVOT oxidation induction time of 200 minutes or more as determined according to a modified ASTM D2272-14a and at a temperature of 150Â°C. 9. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the lubricant composition exhibits a dry RPVOT oxidation induction time as determined according to a modified ASTM D2272-14a at a temperature of 150Â°C of at least 20% greater than an expected dry RPVOT oxidation induction time. 10. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the lubricant composition exhibits a PDSC oxidation induction time of 20 minutes or more as determined at a temperature of 160Â°C. 11. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the lubricant composition exhibits a TEOST 33C deposit of 50 mg or less as determined according to ASTM D6335-16 and a temperature change on a depositor rod from 200Â°C to 480Â°C. 12. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein Ri and R2 are each a C1-C5 alkyl. 13. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein both Ri and R2 are the same. 14. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein A is a Ci-Ce alkylene. 15. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein X is -C(0)0- 16. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein R3 includes a Cio-Cso alkyl. 17. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein R3 includes a C10-C20 alkyl. 18. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the lubricant composition comprises a mixture of two or more phenolic antioxidants each having a different R3. 19. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein R4, Rs, and R6 are each alkyl. 20. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein R4, Rs, and R6 are each independently a C1-C10 alkyl. 21. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein R4, Rs, and R6 are each independently a C4-C6 alkyl. 22. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein m, n, and 0 are 1 . 23. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein two of m, n, and 0 are 1 and one of m, n, and 0 is 2. 24. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein one of m, n, and 0 is 1 and two of m, n, and 0 are 2 25. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein m, n, and 0 are 2. 26. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the phosphite antioxidant has any of the following structures: a mixture thereof. 27. The lubricant composition of claim 26 wherein the lubricant composition comprises at least two phosphite antioxidants. 28. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the lubricant composition further comprises an alkanolamine. 29. The lubricant composition of claim 28, wherein the alkanolamine comprises triisopropanolamine. 30. The lubricant composition of claim 28, wherein the alkanolamine is present in an amount of about 5 wt.% or less. 31. The lubricant composition of claim 28, wherein the alkanolamine is present in an amount of 0 wt.%. 32. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , the antioxidant composition consisting essentially of the phenolic antioxidant and the phosphite antioxidant. 33. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the phosphite has a molecular weight of from about 400 g/mol to about 1 ,000 g/mol. 34. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the phosphite has a molecular weight of from about 500 g/mol to about 750 g/mol. 35. The lubricant composition of claim 1 , wherein the lubricant composition further comprises a lubricating oil in an amount of about 90 wt.% or more. 36. The lubricant composition of claim 35, wherein the lubricating oil has a kinematic viscosity at 100Â°C of from about 2 to about 200 mm 2 /s. 37. A method of forming the lubricant composition of claim 1 , the method comprising: combining a lubricating oil with the antioxidant composition of claim
